ssdp_auth.description: Authentication is required to connect to {host}.
ssdp_auth.title: Authenticate Victron GX

ssdp_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the Victron GX device {name}?

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of Victron device, usually mDNS name like 'venus.local'
data_description.password: Password for the Victron device, default is empty. This is not your VRM password.
data_description.port: The MQTT port on the host. Normally it is 1883.
data_description.ssl: Indicates whether to use SSL to connect to the Victron device. Normally it is disabled.
data_description.username: Username for the MQTT server, default is empty. Not needed by Victron devices. This is only needed if you route your MQTT messages through a non-Victron server and it does require a username.

generator_gen_id_start_on_temp_enabled.name: Generator start on high temp enabled

system_ess_battery_use.name: ESS only critical loads from battery

state.engine_shutdown: Engine shutdown on low input voltage

state.battery_to_grid_restricted: Battery to grid energy flow restricted
state.grid_to_battery_restricted: Grid to battery energy flow restricted
state.no_flow: No energy flow between battery and grid
state.no_restrictions: No Restrictions between battery and the grid
